targets.expr: sum(increase(ai_gateway_request_cost_total{model_name=~"$model_name", username=~"$username", tenant_name=~"$tenant_name"}[$__range]))

sum(increase(ai_gateway_request_processing_ms_sum{model_name=~"$model_name", username=~"$username", tenant_name=~"$tenant_name"}[$__range]))
/
sum(increase(ai_gateway_request_processing_ms_count{model_name=~"$model_name", username=~"$username", tenant_name=~"$tenant_name"}[$__range]))

sum by(username) (rate(ai_gateway_request_processing_ms_sum{model_name=~"$model_name", username=~"$username", tenant_name=~"$tenant_name"}[$__rate_interval])) / sum by(username) (rate(ai_gateway_request_processing_ms_count{username=~"$username", model_name=~"$model_name", tenant_name=~"$tenant_name"}[$__rate_interval]))

sum by(username) (rate(ai_gateway_first_token_latency_ms_sum{model_name=~"$model_name", username=~"$username", tenant_name=~"$tenant_name"}[$__rate_interval])) / sum by(username) (rate(ai_gateway_first_token_latency_ms_count{username=~"$username", model_name=~"$model_name", tenant_name=~"$tenant_name"}[$__rate_interval]))

sum by(username) (
  rate(ai_gateway_inter_token_latency_ms_sum{model_name=~"$model_name", username=~"$username", tenant_name=~"$tenant_name"}[$__rate_interval])
)
/
sum by(username) (
  rate(ai_gateway_inter_token_latency_ms_count{model_name=~"$model_name", username=~"$username", tenant_name=~"$tenant_name"}[$__rate_interval])
)
sum by(error_code, exception_class) (rate(ai_gateway_request_model_inference_failure_total{model_name=~"$model_name", username=~"$username", tenant_name=~"$tenant_name"}[$__rate_interval]))

sum by (username, model_name, tenant_name)((max_over_time(ai_gateway_input_tokens_total{model_name=~"$model_name", username=~"$username", tenant_name=~"$tenant_name"}[$__range]@${__to:date:seconds}) - max_over_time(ai_gateway_input_tokens_total{model_name=~"$model_name", username=~"$username", tenant_name=~"$tenant_name"}[$__rate_interval]@${__from:date:seconds})) or (max_over_time(ai_gateway_input_tokens_total{model_name=~"$model_name", username=~"$username", tenant_name=~"$tenant_name"}[$__range]@${__to:date:seconds})))

sum by (username, model_name, tenant_name) ((max_over_time(ai_gateway_output_tokens_total{model_name=~"$model_name", username=~"$username", tenant_name=~"$tenant_name"}[$__range]@${__to:date:seconds}) - max_over_time(ai_gateway_output_tokens_total{model_name=~"$model_name", username=~"$username", tenant_name=~"$tenant_name"}[$__rate_interval]@${__from:date:seconds})) or (max_over_time(ai_gateway_output_tokens_total{model_name=~"$model_name", username=~"$username", tenant_name=~"$tenant_name"}[$__range]@${__to:date:seconds})))

sum by(model_name) (rate(ai_gateway_request_processing_ms_sum{model_name=~"$model_name", username=~"$username", tenant_name=~"$tenant_name"}[$__rate_interval])) / sum by(model_name) (rate(ai_gateway_request_processing_ms_count{username=~"$username", model_name=~"$model_name", tenant_name=~"$tenant_name"}[$__rate_interval]))

sum by(model_name) (rate(ai_gateway_first_token_latency_ms_sum{model_name=~"$model_name", username=~"$username", tenant_name=~"$tenant_name"}[$__rate_interval])) / sum by(model_name) (rate(ai_gateway_first_token_latency_ms_count{username=~"$username", model_name=~"$model_name", tenant_name=~"$tenant_name"}[$__rate_interval]))

sum by(model_name) (
  rate(ai_gateway_inter_token_latency_ms_sum{model_name=~"$model_name", username=~"$username", tenant_name=~"$tenant_name"}[$__rate_interval])
)
/
sum by(model_name) (
  rate(ai_gateway_inter_token_latency_ms_count{model_name=~"$model_name", username=~"$username", tenant_name=~"$tenant_name"}[$__rate_interval])
)
sum by(error_code, exception_class) (rate(ai_gateway_request_model_inference_failure_total{model_name=~"$model_name", username=~"$username", tenant_name=~"$tenant_name"}[$__rate_interval]))

sum by (username, model_name, tenant_name)((max_over_time(ai_gateway_input_tokens_total{model_name=~"$model_name", username=~"$username", tenant_name=~"$tenant_name"}[$__range]@${__to:date:seconds}) - max_over_time(ai_gateway_input_tokens_total{model_name=~"$model_name", username=~"$username", tenant_name=~"$tenant_name"}[$__rate_interval]@${__from:date:seconds})) or (max_over_time(ai_gateway_input_tokens_total{model_name=~"$model_name", username=~"$username", tenant_name=~"$tenant_name"}[$__range]@${__to:date:seconds})))

sum by (username, model_name, tenant_name) ((max_over_time(ai_gateway_output_tokens_total{model_name=~"$model_name", username=~"$username", tenant_name=~"$tenant_name"}[$__range]@${__to:date:seconds}) - max_over_time(ai_gateway_output_tokens_total{model_name=~"$model_name", username=~"$username", tenant_name=~"$tenant_name"}[$__rate_interval]@${__from:date:seconds})) or (max_over_time(ai_gateway_output_tokens_total{model_name=~"$model_name", username=~"$username", tenant_name=~"$tenant_name"}[$__range]@${__to:date:seconds})))

sum by (tool_name) (rate(ai_gateway_agent_tool_latency_ms_sum{tool_name!=""}[$__rate_interval]))
/
sum by (tool_name) (rate(ai_gateway_agent_tool_latency_ms_count{tool_name!=""}[$__rate_interval]))

panels.title: Spans Accepted (rate)
panels.description: Rate of ai_gateway_spans_accepted_total — spans that passed the gateway's span processor checks and were handed to the exporter. Top of the export funnel; baseline for what should reach the collector.

targets.expr: sum(rate(ai_gateway_spans_accepted_total{tenant_name=~"$tenant_name"}[5m]))

panels.title: Spans Exported by Outcome (rate)
panels.description: Rate of ai_gateway_spans_exported_total split success vs failed. Counts SPANS (advances by the batch's span count when each export batch settles; retries are not double-counted) — same per-span unit as ai_gateway_spans_accepted_total, so the two are directly comparable. At steady state 'success' should track 'accepted'; any 'failed' is telemetry lost at the collector hop.

targets.expr: sum by (outcome) (rate(ai_gateway_spans_exported_total{tenant_name=~"$tenant_name"}[5m]))

panels.title: Span Drops (rate)
panels.description: Rate of ai_gateway_span_drops_total — spans dropped by the gateway span processor BEFORE export (should_trace off, or missing created_by_subject). Distinct from export failures: these never entered the exporter. See 'Drops by Reason' for the breakdown.

targets.expr: sum(rate(ai_gateway_span_drops_total{tenant_name=~"$tenant_name"}[5m]))

panels.title: Successful Exports by Tenant (rate)
panels.description: rate(ai_gateway_spans_exported_total{outcome="success"}) grouped by tenant_name — spans that actually reached the collector per tenant. Compare against 'Accepted by Tenant' to spot per-tenant loss.

targets.expr: sum by (tenant_name) (rate(ai_gateway_spans_exported_total{tenant_name=~"$tenant_name", outcome="success"}[5m]))

panels.title: Failed Exports by Tenant & Reason (rate)
panels.description: rate(ai_gateway_spans_exported_total{outcome="failed"}) grouped by tenant_name AND reason. Reason buckets: timeout / connection_refused / http_4xx / http_5xx / unknown. A tenant spiking here is losing telemetry; the reason says where to look.

targets.expr: sum by (tenant_name, reason) (rate(ai_gateway_spans_exported_total{tenant_name=~"$tenant_name", outcome="failed"}[5m]))

panels.title: Accepted by Tenant (rate)
panels.description: rate(ai_gateway_spans_accepted_total) grouped by tenant_name — per-tenant baseline entering the export path. High accepted but low successful export = downstream loss for that tenant.

targets.expr: sum by (tenant_name) (rate(ai_gateway_spans_accepted_total{tenant_name=~"$tenant_name"}[5m]))

panels.title: Drops by Reason (rate)
panels.description: rate(ai_gateway_span_drops_total) grouped by reason. should_trace_false = tracing intentionally off (usually expected). missing_created_by_subject_child = request context not propagated. missing_created_by_subject_root = 'should never happen' bug — investigate any non-zero.

targets.expr: sum by (reason) (rate(ai_gateway_span_drops_total{tenant_name=~"$tenant_name"}[5m]))

panels.title: Failed Exports by Tenant & Reason — total over selected range
panels.description: Total count (not a rate) of failed exported spans over the dashboard's time range, per tenant × reason, via increase(...[$__range]). Tracks the time picker — widen the range to include when failures occurred. NOTE: increase() extrapolates to range edges, so values are estimates and may be fractional. Empty means the counter didn't grow in the selected window (failures may be older).

targets.expr: sum by (tenant_name, reason) (increase(ai_gateway_spans_exported_total{tenant_name=~"$tenant_name", outcome="failed"}[$__range]))
